message:
Regenerate conformance fixtures and test gate artifacts

Conformance fixtures: bash_tool.json and edit_tool.json reformatted
with expanded JSON structure (inline objects → multi-line), bash exit
code test updated to use content_contains instead of expect_error/
error_contains. cli_flags.json and truncation.json minor updates.

Cross-platform reports: regenerated linux platform events and reports
with current timestamps and run IDs.

Ext conformance: regenerated CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md and summary JSON
with updated counts (na: 163→164, total: 223→224) and new correlation
ID.

Full suite gate: regenerated all gate artifacts (certification verdict,
events, report, full suite verdict/events/report, perf3x coverage
audit, practical finish checkpoint, preflight verdict, waiver audit,
artifact retention report) with current run timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
